easy: The cat sat on the mat.

medium: A journey of a thousand miles begins with a single step.

hard: In computer science, a stack is a linear data structure that follows the Last In First Out (LIFO) principle.
The quicksort algorithm is an efficient sorting algorithm that employs a divide-and-conquer strategy.
Machine learning is a subset of artificial intelligence that focuses on the development of algorithms that allow computers to learn from and make predictions based on data.
